hero.title: View CSV files instantly in your browser
hero.description:
CSV Viewer is a fast, free tool for opening, exploring, and analyzing CSV files.
No download or installation required — just drag, drop, and explore.
hero.tip: 🔒 Your files stay in your browser — nothing is uploaded to our servers

introduce.title: What is CSV Viewer
introduce.label: Introduce
introduce.description: CSV Viewer is a browser-based tool that lets you open and explore CSV files without installing any software. Upload a file, browse rows and columns, and get insights in seconds.

image.alt: CSV Viewer table preview with sample sales data

items.title: Drag & Drop Upload
items.description: Simply drag a CSV file into the browser window or click to browse. Your file is parsed instantly.

items.title: Interactive Table View
items.description: Browse your data in a clean, scrollable table with column headers, row numbers, and responsive layout.

items.title: Sort & Filter Columns
items.description: Click column headers to sort ascending or descending. Search across all rows to find what you need.

items.title: Export Your Data
items.description: Download filtered or sorted results as CSV or JSON with a single click.

how_to_use.label: How it works
how_to_use.title: How to use CSV Viewer
how_to_use.description: CSV Viewer is built for the moments when you simply need to open a CSV file and understand what is inside. There is no account, import wizard, or spreadsheet setup. Open the page, choose a file, and the table is ready in your browser.

items.title: Upload a CSV file
items.description: Drag a file into CSV Viewer or use the file picker. It works as a CSV Opener for quick checks, exported reports, product lists, customer files, and database dumps.

items.title: Review rows and columns
items.description: CSV Viewer reads the header row and presents the file as a clean table, so you can scan fields, spot missing values, and confirm that the data looks right before sharing or importing it. CSV Viewer is meant to make that first pass quick.

items.title: Search, sort, and filter
items.description: Use CSV Viewer Online to find a record, check a column, or sort a report without opening a heavy spreadsheet app. It is useful when you need an answer, not a full workbook.

items.title: Export what you need
items.description: After reviewing the file, CSV Viewer lets you export the result as CSV or JSON. This keeps the workflow simple for handoffs, QA checks, data cleanup, and lightweight analysis.

use_cases.title: Common ways people use CSV Viewer
use_cases.description: CSV files show up in everyday work: ad platforms, analytics tools, payment processors, CRMs, support desks, ecommerce systems, and internal databases all export them. CSV Viewer gives you a fast place to inspect those files before you decide what to do next, and CSV Viewer keeps that first review simple.

items.title: Marketing exports
items.description: Check campaign results, keyword lists, UTM reports, and audience exports without waiting for a spreadsheet to load. CSV Viewer helps you confirm column names, totals, and obvious formatting problems quickly.

items.title: Sales and customer lists
items.description: Open lead lists, CRM exports, signup data, and account reports in a readable table. A simple Online CSV Viewer is often enough when the job is to inspect the file before importing it elsewhere.

items.title: Product catalogs
items.description: Review SKU files, inventory exports, pricing sheets, and marketplace templates. CSV Viewer makes it easier to catch empty fields, shifted columns, or strange delimiters before a catalog upload, especially when CSV Viewer is only needed for a quick check.

items.title: Finance reports
items.description: Open transaction exports, payout files, invoice records, and reconciliation lists. CSV Viewer is a practical CSV Reader when you need to verify rows and columns without changing the original file.

items.title: Developer data checks
items.description: Inspect log exports, database query results, seed files, and test fixtures. CSV Viewer gives developers a quick browser-based way to check data shape before writing scripts or running imports.

items.title: Support operations
items.description: Review ticket exports, survey responses, contact lists, and incident reports. CSV Viewer keeps the file easy to scan, which helps teams answer simple data questions without building a dashboard or sending the file through another tool.

spreadsheet_alternative.title: A CSV Reader for quick checks, not another spreadsheet
spreadsheet_alternative.description: Spreadsheet apps are great when you need formulas, charts, and collaboration. They are slower when all you want is to open a CSV file, confirm the columns, search for a value, or check an export. CSV Viewer focuses on that first review step. It works as a lightweight CSV Opener in the browser, so you can view the file without creating an account, uploading it to a workspace, or changing the source data.

image.alt: CSV Viewer Online showing a CSV file in a browser table

items.title: Fast first look
items.description: Use CSV Viewer when you need to know what is in a file before opening a larger tool.

items.title: No forced workflow
items.description: The file opens as a table. There is no template choice, cloud import, or workbook setup.

items.title: Private by design
items.description: CSV Viewer processes files in your browser, which is useful for customer data and internal exports. CSV Viewer keeps the review step local.

benefits.title: Why Choose CSV Viewer
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: A simple, privacy-first way to work with CSV files — built for analysts, developers, and anyone who deals with data.

items.title: No Installation Needed
items.description: Works entirely in your browser. Open csvviewer.net on any device and start viewing files immediately.

image.alt: Drag and drop CSV upload zone in the browser

items.title: Privacy First
items.description: Your CSV files are processed locally in your browser. We never upload or store your data on our servers.

image.alt: CSV data processed locally in the browser

items.title: Works Everywhere
items.description: Compatible with Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge on desktop and mobile. No plugins required.

image.alt: CSV Viewer responsive table on mobile

features.description: Everything you need to open, explore, and work with CSV files — fast and free.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have another question? Contact us at support@csvviewer.net.

items.question: What is CSV Viewer?
items.answer: CSV Viewer is a free, browser-based tool for opening and exploring CSV (Comma-Separated Values) files. You can upload a file, browse it in a table, sort columns, search rows, and export results — all without installing any software.

items.question: Is my data safe? Do you upload my files?
items.answer: Your privacy is our priority. CSV Viewer processes files entirely in your browser using client-side JavaScript. Your data is never uploaded to or stored on our servers.

items.question: What file formats are supported?
items.answer: CSV Viewer supports standard CSV files (.csv) with comma, semicolon, or tab delimiters. UTF-8 encoding is fully supported, including files with BOM headers.

items.question: Is there a file size limit?
items.answer: CSV Viewer can handle files up to several hundred megabytes, depending on your browser and device memory. For very large files, pagination keeps the interface responsive.

items.question: Do I need to create an account?
items.answer: No account is required. CSV Viewer is free to use with no sign-up needed. Just open the site and upload your file.

items.question: Can I use CSV Viewer on mobile?
items.answer: Yes. CSV Viewer works on modern mobile browsers including Safari on iOS and Chrome on Android. The table view is responsive and scrollable on smaller screens.

cta.title: Start viewing your CSV files today
cta.description: Free, fast, and private. Open csvviewer.net and upload your first file in seconds.
